title: pellionia fruticulosa
intro: Pellionia fruticulosa, also known as the 'Elephant Ear' or 'Chinese Fan', is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Pellionia fruticulosa has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
